# 2.8 Pipeline Configuration

**Design rationale:** All pipeline configuration uses PureConfig auto-derivation. Vote type weights, committee attribution weights, and analysis pass routing are configurable per environment.

## Types

| Class | Fields | Notes |
|-------|--------|-------|
| `VoteWeights` | passage: Double (1.0), conferenceReport: Double (1.0), cloture: Double (0.8), vetoOverride: Double (0.9), amendment: Double (0.5), committee: Double (0.4), motionToRecommit: Double (0.6), other: Double (0.5) | `forVoteType(vt: VoteType): Double` lookup method |
| `CommitteeAttributionWeights` | chairman: Double (1.0), rankingMember: Double (0.7), viceChairman: Double (0.6), member: Double (0.4) | Mirrors `CommitteePosition.weight` from shared-models; configurable per environment |
| `AnalysisPassConfig` | pass1Model: String ("claude-3-haiku"), pass2Model: String ("claude-3-sonnet"), pass3Model: String ("claude-3-opus"), pass1Enabled: Boolean (true), pass2Enabled: Boolean (true), pass3Enabled: Boolean (true) | LLM model per analysis pass |
| `PipelineConfig` | parallelism: Int (4), batchSize: Int (100), pageSize: Int (250), voteWeights: VoteWeights, committeeWeights: CommitteeAttributionWeights, analysisPass: AnalysisPassConfig, retry: RetryConfig | Root configuration; loaded via PureConfig |

## Acceptance Criteria

**Functional:**
1. `VoteWeights` has PureConfig auto-derivation; loads from HOCON with sensible defaults
2. `VoteWeights.forVoteType(vt: VoteType): Double` returns correct weight for all 8 vote types; unknown types default to `other` (0.5)
3. `CommitteeAttributionWeights` has PureConfig auto-derivation; defaults match `CommitteePosition.weight` from shared-models
4. `AnalysisPassConfig` has PureConfig auto-derivation; all passes enabled by default
5. `PipelineConfig` has PureConfig auto-derivation; composes all sub-configs
6. All weight values are `Double` in 0.0–1.0 range

**Tests:**
7. `VoteWeights.forVoteType` for all 8 vote types — verify correct default per type
8. `VoteWeights` from HOCON with overrides — verify overrides apply
9. `PipelineConfig` from minimal HOCON — verify defaults for missing fields
10. `PipelineConfig` from full HOCON — verify all fields populated
11. `CommitteeAttributionWeights` defaults match `CommitteePosition.weight` values from shared-models
